description: Add a temporary railcar storage entry for Chlorine to the Midwest Bulk Transload facility. Using EPA Tier2 Submit 2025 (already open), import the facility's baseline data from C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Tasks\midwest_baseline.t2s. Navigate to the Chemical Inventory section and add a new chemical: Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5), EHS: Yes, Pure, Gas. Check Physical Hazards: Oxidizing and Gas under pressure. Check Health Hazards: Acute toxicity, Skin Corrosion, and Serious eye damage. Set Maximum and Average Daily Amounts to 180,000 lbs. CRUCIAL: Set the Number of Days On-Site to 45. Add a Storage Location with Container Type: Rail Car, Pressure: Greater than ambient pressure, Temperature: Ambient temperature, and Location Description: Rail Siding Track 4. Finally, save and export the submission file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Tier2Output\midwest_transload.t2s.
